name: sd_context
description: 查询 SD 编辑器上下文：包信息、图列表、节点结构、参数详情。 Use when AI needs to: (1) get package info, (2) list graphs, (3) inspect node network, (4) check node parameters. Substance Designer only (run_python).
author: ArtClaw
